name: Sofia Martinez
title: Stunning camera and battery life
text: The Aurora X2 Pro exceeded my expectations — night photos are incredible and the battery easily lasts all day.

name: Daniel Kim
title: Great phone, slight heating
text: Love the performance but it gets warm under heavy load. Still a great purchase for photographers.

name: Aisha Patel
title: Lightweight workhorse
text: Perfect laptop for travel — light, fast and the battery lasts all day.

name: Liam O'Connor
title: Amazing low-light shots
text: If you love night photography, this is the phone to beat in its class.

name: Maya Singh
title: Good sound but fit issues
text: Sound quality is great for the price, but they don't always stay in my ears during runs.

name: Ethan Zhang
title: Love the UI and speed
text: Smooth UI, great display, and cameras are top-notch. No buyers remorse.
